titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to the Morris Erdheim papers, 1935-1960, bulk 1953-1960
titlestmt.author: Compiled by Laura Finkel

publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library

titlepage.titleproper: Guide to the Morris Erdheim papers, 1935-1960, bulk 1953-1960
titlepage.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections Cornell University Library

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item:

did.head: DESCRIPTIVE SUMMARY

persname.normal: [give the MARC presentation of creator here, i.e., surname first; include dates]

did.repository: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library
did.abstract: Two scrapbooks of programs, newclippings, etc., documenting Morris Erdheim's career in veterinary nutrition. There are also several loose programs and articles, and a small collection of photographs from Erdheim's education at the New York State Collegeof Veterinary Medicine at Cornell University.

bioghist.head: BIOGRAPHICAL NOTE
bioghist.p: Veterinarian; Cornell University DVM, Class of 1939;staff veterinarian at Dawe's Laboratories, Inc.

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Two scrapbooks of programs, newclippings, etc., documenting Morris Erdheim's career in veterinary nutrition. There are also several loose programs and articles, and a small collection of photographs from Erdheim's education at the New York State Collegeof Veterinary Medicine at Cornell University.

controlaccess.head: Names:
controlaccess.corpname: New York State College of Veterinary Medicine

relatedmaterial.head: RELATED MATERIAL
relatedmaterial.p:
See also the Morris Erdheim oral history interview in the College of Veterinary Medicine Oral History Collection
RMC # 24-04-3349

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Morris Erdheim papers, #6605. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
